data.name: Draconic Date
data.detailed_description:
While you enjoy your repeated (sexual) encounters with the Queen of the Peaks, you decide one time to invite her to a date to an abandoned castle instead of just fucking her right then and there. Surprised but eager, she accepts and a couple days later, you both meet in front of the mysterious building.


Draconic Date is a short, fully voiced visual novel taking place right after Magical Waifus Academy. Play as male or female as you explore the castle... and your date! Enjoy the story as well as an interactive sleepless night of pure bliss.

Experience the continued story of Magical Waifus Academy in this male or female led visual novel

End your date with a fully animated sleepless night
data.about_the_game:
While you enjoy your repeated (sexual) encounters with the Queen of the Peaks, you decide one time to invite her to a date to an abandoned castle instead of just fucking her right then and there. Surprised but eager, she accepts and a couple days later, you both meet in front of the mysterious building.


Draconic Date is a short, fully voiced visual novel taking place right after Magical Waifus Academy. Play as male or female as you explore the castle... and your date! Enjoy the story as well as an interactive sleepless night of pure bliss.

Experience the continued story of Magical Waifus Academy in this male or female led visual novel

End your date with a fully animated sleepless night
data.short_description: By invoking the old Dragon Law, you managed to get your dragon girlfriend out for a date. What will you discover in that old abandoned castle, and what bounds will you forge with Iryl?
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
